title: store migration v2: group_members_v2 CREATE IF NOT EXISTS allows partial schema on failure
description: store.rs migration v1->v2 (line 143): uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for group_members_v2. If the migration was previously interrupted after group_members_v2 was created but before rename, the next startup will skip the CREATE (table exists), attempt to INSERT from old group_members (which may be gone), then rename group_members_v2 which is now empty. Data silently lost. Should DROP TABLE IF EXISTS group_members_v2 at the start of the migration block to ensure a clean slate.
